entries.title: Newton's First Law
entries.content: An object remains at rest or in uniform motion unless acted on by a net external force. Also called law of inertia.

entries.title: Newton's Third Law
entries.content: For every action there is an equal and opposite reaction. Forces always occur in pairs.

entries.title: Potential Energy
entries.content: Stored energy due to position. Gravitational: PE = mgh. Elastic: stored in springs.

entries.title: Snell's Law
entries.content: Describes refraction of light at boundary between media. Light bends toward normal in denser medium.
entries.formula: n₁ sin θ₁ = n₂ sin θ₂

entries.title: Doppler Effect
entries.content: Frequency shifts when source and observer move relative to each other. Higher pitch approaching, lower receding.
